programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China's perspective, policies and stories.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante condizioni meteorologiche estreme, un elicottero compie un viaggio di routine.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Poco dopo il decollo, l’equipaggio del DHL A300 viene catapultato in una lotta per la propria vita.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un operatore radar militare identifica erroneamente un aereo civile in avvicinamento come un F-14 ostile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Gli investigatori sospettano inizialmente la presenza di una bomba a bordo del volo Continental Express 2574.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Arrow Air 1285 fa rifornimento e pochi secondi dopo il decollo si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Airbus Air France con a bordo 180 persone è stato dirottato da quattro terroristi poco prima del decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo British Airways 38 subisce un guasto inspiegabile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo aereo pendolare, il volo Air Midwest 5481, è in un breve tragitto quando si verifica il disastro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 401 ha tre luci verdi che confermano il carrello bloccato, ma ne funzionano solo due.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a far atterrare d’emergenza il loro 747 danneggiato in Alaska.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo PSA 182 si scontra con un Cessna e entrambi gli aerei precipitano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: L’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo British Airways 111 sanno che qualcosa non va per niente bene.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Chi sta Pilotando l’Aereo?” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air Cargo 8509 si schianta in un campo a nord-est di Londra.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Flash Airlines 604 si schianta nel Mar Rosso pochi minuti dopo il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 1549 collide con uno stormo di uccelli.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo TAM Airlines 3054 sfreccia lungo la pista ad alta velocità e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 232 subisce un grave guasto quando uno dei motori esplode.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: È esplosa una bomba e l’aereo ha subito gravi danni.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air India 182 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi secondi dopo il decollo, i motori iniziano a emettere una serie di forti boati in rapida successione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti, desiderosi di recuperare il ritardo, stanno spingendo il Boeing 757 al limite.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo problema meccanico si trasforma rapidamente in un’emergenza totale.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una serie di piccoli errori fa precipitare il volo China Airlines 006 di 30.000 piedi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Otto giocatori del Manchester United muoiono in un noto incidente aereo a Monaco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un comandante lotta per mantenere l’aereo in volo e improvvisamente precipita verso il suolo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una notte intensa all’aeroporto di Los Angeles, mentre il volo US Air 1493 è in fase di atterraggio.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air Inter 148 inizia la discesa verso l’aeroporto di Strasburgo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Si sentono colpi di arma da fuoco nella cabina del volo Pacific Southwest Airlines 1771.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un pilota teme che la forte nevicata possa ritardare ulteriormente la partenza.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi istanti dopo il decollo, i piloti del volo Birgenair 301 vengono bombardati da allarmi confusi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Negli ultimi secondi del volo, l’aereo precipita improvvisamente dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo che trasporta un gruppo di scolari è su una rotta di collisione con un aereo cargo della DHL.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una breve tratta si trasforma rapidamente in un incubo per l’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo 243.

programme.desc: Durante il tranquillo volo 009 verso l’Australia, del fumo inizia a riempire la cabina dell'aereo passeggeri.

programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E20 - Case Closed
programme.desc: The illegal killing of multiple animals over the past five years by a family of poachers is going to trial; wardens on the witness stand hope for a guilty verdict and a closed case.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E08 - Secret Trade
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates Africa's infamous poaching trade.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E11 - Naturally Distinctive
programme.desc: In this episode we visit places where people haven’t had it easy. Despite the hardships they experience daily, they choose to stay and shape their destiny. Bamiyan – a poverty stricken Afghan province, mercilessly tested by time. Niğde – a Turkish province with striking history. And Patagonia – the rough land at the very end of the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E12 - Naturally Refreshing
programme.desc: Thailand is one of the few countries in south-east Asia that has never been a European colony. Perhaps the word “thai” which means “free” has something to do with it. It is possibly the reason why this country evokes a certain magic that sets it apart from the surrounding countries. From Thailand we travel to Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E13 - The Best Of
programme.desc: Miracles of Nature has travelled to the four corners of the Earth - we look back over the astonishing range of destinations visited – each offering remarkable and stunning sights combined with dramatic histories and awe inspiring beauty.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E01 - Dangerous on Land
programme.desc: This episode offers an exciting look at nature with close-ups of wild cats, snakes, crocodiles, scorpions, etc., focusing on the animals' methods of defense or predation (venom, teeth, claws, size, etc.). In this episode you will learn all about the wild world of dangerous animals

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E06 - Montana Elk
programme.desc: Can Laramy survive the harsh conditions of elk country? With one misfire and a fresh blanket of snow on the mountains, the task of harvesting an elk for the winter is getting harder and harder.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E07 - Blacksmith Show
programme.desc: Forging one's own tools was a valuable skill for the mountain men. Laramy takes hammer to steel as he shows us how he crafts his own gear.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E08 - Idaho Elk
programme.desc: With a tag in pocket, Laramy takes to the mountains of Idaho on the hunt for the elusive elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E09 - Trapping Part 2
programme.desc: Winter trapping requires different skills than trapping in the spring. Laramy pulls out all the tricks to trap for critters.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E06 - Snakebite!
programme.desc: Manny is severely bitten by a large western diamondback rattlesnake while taping an episode of Savage Wild in south Texas.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E07 - Black Bear Encounter
programme.desc: Manny Puig experiences hair-raising encounters in the dead of night with massive Florida black bears. Florida is where animals that belong in the north woods come face to face with animals from the tropics and the bears here are confrontational.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S03:E01 - Python Invasion
programme.desc: Armed with only his wits, the most rudimentary tools and devices, and zero armour, predatory expert Manny Puig will guide you through some of the murkiest waters and most dangerous places on earth. In this episode Manny Puig is looking for giant snakes which have invaded the Everglades.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E08 - Secret Trade
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates Africa's infamous poaching trade.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E11 - Naturally Distinctive

It is possibly the reason why this country evokes a certain magic that sets it apart from the surrounding countries. From Thailand we travel to Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E13 - The Best Of
programme.desc: Miracles of Nature has travelled to the four corners of the Earth - we look back over the astonishing range of destinations visited – each offering remarkable and stunning sights combined with dramatic histories and awe inspiring beauty.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E01 - Dangerous on Land
programme.desc: This episode offers an exciting look at nature with close-ups of wild cats, snakes, crocodiles, scorpions, etc., focusing on the animals' methods of defense or predation (venom, teeth, claws, size, etc.). In this episode you will learn all about the wild world of dangerous animals

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E06 - Montana Elk
programme.desc: Can Laramy survive the harsh conditions of elk country? With one misfire and a fresh blanket of snow on the mountains, the task of harvesting an elk for the winter is getting harder and harder.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E07 - Blacksmith Show
programme.desc: Forging one's own tools was a valuable skill for the mountain men. Laramy takes hammer to steel as he shows us how he crafts his own gear.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E08 - Idaho Elk
programme.desc: With a tag in pocket, Laramy takes to the mountains of Idaho on the hunt for the elusive elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E09 - Trapping Part 2
programme.desc: Winter trapping requires different skills than trapping in the spring. Laramy pulls out all the tricks to trap for critters.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E06 - Snakebite!
programme.desc: Manny is severely bitten by a large western diamondback rattlesnake while taping an episode of Savage Wild in south Texas.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S02:E07 - Black Bear Encounter
programme.desc: Manny Puig experiences hair-raising encounters in the dead of night with massive Florida black bears. Florida is where animals that belong in the north woods come face to face with animals from the tropics and the bears here are confrontational.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S03:E01 - Python Invasion
programme.desc: Armed with only his wits, the most rudimentary tools and devices, and zero armour, predatory expert Manny Puig will guide you through some of the murkiest waters and most dangerous places on earth. In this episode Manny Puig is looking for giant snakes which have invaded the Everglades.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E08 - Secret Trade
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates Africa's infamous poaching trade.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E11 - Naturally Distinctive
programme.desc: In this episode we visit places where people haven’t had it easy. Despite the hardships they experience daily, they choose to stay and shape their destiny. Bamiyan – a poverty stricken Afghan province, mercilessly tested by time. Niğde – a Turkish province with striking history. And Patagonia – the rough land at the very end of the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E12 - Naturally Refreshing
programme.desc: Thailand is one of the few countries in south-east Asia that has never been a European colony. Perhaps the word “thai” which means “free” has something to do with it. programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E08 - Secret Trade
programme.desc: Ivan Carter investigates Africa's infamous poaching trade.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E10 - The Ancient Ones
programme.desc: Arctic. Jim and Corey's Arctic adventure starts with Muskox, an animal practically forgotten since pre-historic times in the Arctic.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E01 - Law Dodgers
programme.desc: Montana Region 4 warden Bryan Golie chases down hunters that dodged a game-check station. A nearly-four-hour investigation reveals exactly what they were hiding.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E02 - Crying Shame
programme.desc: Montana U.S.A. Region 5 Warden Nick Taylor is in the crosshairs when a hunter points a gun directly at him. In Region 2, Wardens find a huntress with a secret she is hiding.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E03 - Tickets Please
programme.desc: The commercial space flight companies are edging closer and closer to flight readiness. Paying customers will soon be launching into space; tourist revenue is projected to be a major stepping stone toward space exploration and colonization.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S04:E04 - Planet X
programme.desc: The New Horizons Mission continues deeper into space. With its next target looming close, some speculate that there may be evidence of a mysterious new planet, one long steeped in folklore. Could Planet X exist?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S04:E05 - Nightmare on Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: The guys test scenes from some of our favourite horror films.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S04:E06 - All for One!
programme.desc: The guys put scenes from the Three Musketeers movies to the test.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Flames Fill the sky. An entire city flees in terror. Firefighters bravely rush in.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Doubt and disbelief plague the Stormhunters after an exhaustive chase through Tornado Alley. The team is forced to make an uncomfortable decision. Do they play it safe or push past their fear?

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: On his home turf in Canada, Mark and his team chase one of nature’s deadliest forces, coming face to face with tornadoes’ shear strength.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Canada’s weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia’s back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.

programme.desc: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Storm Chaser Jaclyn Whittal anxiously experiences her first Category 4 Tropical Storm.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark hikes up Mount Washington, New Hampshire, the highest peak in the Northeastern US and battles one of the most dangerous mountains in the world at its peak intensity.

programme.title: Hellfire Heroes
programme.desc: Firefighters race to rescue a trapped child; a truck loaded with flammable welding tanks burns out of control.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: On a rare day off, Josiah and his friends white water raft where few have gone before - on top of the massive Knik Glacier.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots
programme.desc: Alaskan bush pilots risk everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather
programme.desc: A narrow escape from a raging wildfire – a dramatic encounter with a mudslide - the jaw-dropping images of a flash flood – just some of the encounters with two of nature’s most destructive forces caught on camera in this Fire and Water episode.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, Rebecca Barney e il suo futuro ex marito Fred furono trovati colpiti a morte nella loro casa di Tulsa, in Oklahoma, che era stata data alle fiamme.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Ken, il marito di Kristine Fitzhugh, la trovò morta in fondo alle scale della loro casa a Palo Alto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1991, Dorothy Donovan fu assassinata nella sua casa a Dover, Delaware e la polizia era scettica quando suo figlio Charles Holden dichiarò che era stata uccisa da un autostoppista a cui lui aveva dato un passaggio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando il cancelliere Peter Porco non si presenta al lavoro nel novembre 2004, un funzionario del tribunale è richiesto a casa della famiglia Porco a Bethlehem, New York.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1993, la giovane madre Tammy Tatum fu trovata violentata e uccisa nel suo appartamento di Longmont, in Colorado. La polizia inizialmente sospettò del suo ex marito, ma non aveva prove sufficienti per accusarlo e il caso è rimasto irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fifteen years later, DNA technology leads to justice for a murdered woman and her savagely beaten 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un vicedirettore di una steakhouse della Florida viene pugnalato a morte. Sembra essere una rapina andata male, ma un'impronta insanguinata rivela che conosceva il suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Uno scheletro umano venne scoperto nelle paludi della Carolina del Nord. Quando gli investigatori seppero che era morta da 18 mesi, capirono che sarebbe stato difficile scoprire chi fosse, tanto meno chi l'avesse uccisa.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una bamba di nove anni sparisce, polizia e volontari passano settimane a cercarla. La visione di un medium porta a un campo dove si scopre il corpo insieme a ciò che gli inquirenti sperano siano prove adeguate ad aiutarli a trovare il killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1999, Susan Fassett fu freddata mentre lasciava le prove del coro della chiesa a Poughkeepsie, New York. Il marito Jeff diventò il primo sospettato finché non lo scagionò la polizia, che sospettava di Fred Andros, con cui Susan aveva una storia.

programme.desc: I gruppi devono creare un piatto utilizzando ingredienti scelti a caso girando una ruota di roulette.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il ristorante ospita Chef Kumalé, esperto di cucina etnica, per il primo test. Le brigate devono preparare menu con piatti di street food.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco valuta la capacità di mescolare cucine straniere e italiane. L'immunità dall'eliminazione è in palio per un servizio con lo chef Pedro Miguel Schiaffino, esperto di cucina peruviana. Tre nuovi piatti vengono aggiunti al menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: L'ospite al ristorante di Carlo Cracco è l'esperto Carlo Spinelli, che porta ingredienti insoliti come fiori, alghe, sali stranieri e insetti. I cuochi affrontano l'ardua sfida di creare un piatto con questi ingredienti, mettendoli in difficoltà con un menu azzardato per il pranzo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi delle due brigate trascorrono un pomeriggio avventuroso nella campagna pavese, raccogliendo ingredienti e cucinando in situazioni estreme per creare un piatto gourmet. Lo chef Cracco incontra i cuochi individualmente per valutarli e decidere l'immunità, mentre due chef prendono la guida della propria brigata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Come primo test, i cuochi devono creare un piatto ispirato a un giocattolo. La squadra blu vince. Nel servizio del pranzo, i clienti votano i menu tramite un'app, ma nonostante sia il più popolare, il menu rosso riceve meno stelle, causando la sconfitta della squadra.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dopo una sessione di eliminazione che non ha visto nessuno mandato via, Rob è sollevato del fatto di essere ancora presente, ma scocciato perché Russell lo ha messo in difficoltà. Sabrina ha il broncio perché Jillian l'ha nominata e se ne va a letto con il muso. Le altre ragazze del team rosso sono d'accordo sul fatto che l'attitudine e la mancanza di abilità in cucina di Sabrina non potranno mai farle vincere.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I gruppi partecipano a un test di assaggio alla cieca. Saranno in grado di identificare gli ingredienti?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti rimasti devono preparare tre piatti in soli cinque minuti.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti devono preparare cinque porzioni di uno stuzzichino.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I partecipanti devono preparare 80 porzioni di un piatto da servire dal loro food truck.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay prepara un piatto che i partecipanti devono ricreare senza conoscerne gli ingredienti.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida per i partecipanti è creare un piatto fusion.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I finalisti sono portati al LA Market, dove devono cucinare cinque piatti per un test di assaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La gara comincia con la sfida del piatto d'autore.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida dei concorrenti è cucinare la carne seguendo le istruzioni dello Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre preparano un pasto speciale per 50 bambini e le loro madri.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre preparano pietanze di pollo utilizzando solo ingredienti vinti nella sfida di questa settimana.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli aspiranti hanno meno di un'ora per creare sei piatti usando fuoco e acqua.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono preparare il cibo per un raduno per la classe della Culver City High School del 1991.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre hanno 45 minuti per preparare cinque piatti usando la birra come uno degli ingredienti.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Alle squadre viene chiesto di scegliere un leader - ma durante la selezione c’è un colpo di scena.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti preparano dei dessert da servire in una cena romantica.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti mettono alla prova le proprie conoscenze con una degustazione alla cieca.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I rimanenti concorrenti andranno a New York per imparare diversi tipi di cucine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida per le squadre è preparare tre piatti a testa.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti chef fanno squadra, ma le sfide devono essere affronatate individualmente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono realizzare un piatto di alta qualità con salmone dell'Alaska.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I 6 chef rimanenti si avvicinano alla giacca nera. Nel primo test, preparano risotti che riflettono la loro identità, mentre Guglielmo e Shaban emergono come i migliori dei loro team. Guglielmo ottiene la prima giacca nera. Durante il servizio, i cuochi sono osservati da Bottura e alla fine, le giacche nere rimanenti vengono consegnate a Carlotta, Shaban, Kristian e Amalia in questo ordine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Dopo una serata di "eccessi", i cuochi devono preparare piatti detox con Pierangelo Dacrema come ospite. Nel primo servizio con la giacca nera, i migliori cuochi delle prime due edizioni di "Hell's Kitchen Italia" sfidano i concorrenti con un menu dei migliori piatti delle tre edizioni.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Cracco porta i cuochi al refettorio di Bottura per preparare un menu anti-spreco. Durante il servizio serale, devono servire un banchetto con tutti i piatti usciti contemporaneamente per ogni portata, ma tutto va male e nessun immune è al sicuro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Gli ultimi quattro cuochi devono affrontare quattro modi diversi di intendere la cucina. Durante il servizio, ciascuno di loro deve dimostrare le capacità di leadership a turno, con Mirko che assume il comando della brigata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I tre finalisti sono portati dalllo chef Cracco in un hotel di lusso, la Chesa Colani a Madulain, per preparare due piatti classici internazionali. Ma uno di loro deve lasciare Hell's Kitchen prima del servizio finale, che deciderà il nuovo Executive Chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti concorrenti sono sfidati a ricreare un piatto che hanno assaggiato.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli ultimi due concorrenti sono invitati a pranzo dallo chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il boot camp culinario di Gordon Ramsay negli USA mette alla prova nuovi aspiranti chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti hanno un po’ di problemi con la preparazione delle capesante, prima di un servizio serale disastroso.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre preparano un pasto per un gruppo di immigrati che sono appena diventati cittadini americani.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti vengono svegliati presto e sfidati a creare una varietà di piatti a base di agnello.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gara culinaria negli USA. Le squadre vengono informate sulla prossima sfida che sarà cucinare cibo messicano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I restanti concorrenti devono creare dei piatti per tre stilisti di moda.

programme.desc: Tutti a bordo del treno dell'apprendimento! Ted è un treno che insegna ai bambini i colori, gli animali, la frutta, la verdura e molto altro.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi trovano nel bosco un piccolo drago malato e lo portano al villaggio per curarlo. Gargamella, però, cattura il drago e decide di utilizzarlo contro i Puffi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi si incamminano verso la montagna della nebbia convinti che lì viva Puffo Stregone, ma una volta arrivati scoprono che ad aspettarli c'è Gargamella. | I Puffi trovano una strana bottiglia in cui vive un genio che esaudirà tre dei loro desideri se i Puffi sapranno dirgli la formula magica.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il fertilizzante che ha preparato Grande Puffo non funziona come dovrebbe e trasforma un uccellino in un terribile mostro…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffetta ritrova nel bosco il medaglione magico della strega Agata la quale chiede a Gargamella di aiutarla a cercare il prezioso gioiello.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Inventore vuole conquistare il cuore di Puffetta perciò le regala un paio di occhiali magici che rendono bello tutto ciò che si guarda… | Puffo Sognatore parte alla scoperta del mondo. Grande puffo gli regala un fischietto da utilizzare in caso di bisogno.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il Gigante Bue Grasso aiuta Gargamella a cercare il villaggio dei Puffi per cucinare un'appetitosa zuppa di Puffo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Inventore crea un Puffo meccanico per aiutare i puffi nelle loro attività quotidiane. I Puffi sono molto contenti ma qualcosa va storto…

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Pigrone sogna di trovarsi in un paradiso puffato in cui si può riposare senza dover svolfere tutti i lavori che Grande Puffo gli affida. | Quattrocchi organizza un viaggio in cima alla Montagna Ghiacciata per raccogliere il polline del Fior di Neve di cui Grande Puffo ha bisogno.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi scoprono una sorgente che hai il potere di ringiovanire chi ne beve l'acqua. Grande Puffo la beve e si trasforma in un piccolo Puffo che crea gran confusione nel villaggio…

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Jack Il Ciclone
programme.desc: Jack è tornato e stavolta è alle prese congli half-pipe delle cime innevate del Colorado. Jack fa squadra con due fratelli e diventa presto un campione dello snowboard! Le sue abilità lo portano dove nessuno scimpanzé era stato prima.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: Spymate
programme.desc: Minkey, una super scimmia addestrata come spia, fa squadra con il suo ex partner Mike per salvare la figlia di Mike dalle grinfie di uno scienziato malvagio.

programme.title: The Duke - Il Duca
programme.desc: Quando Hubert, il fedele compagno a quattro zampe del Duca di Dingwall, eredita le proprietà del Duca, fa squadra con la nipote del Maggiordomo per contrastare alcuni avidi parenti del caro estinto.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar 3 - si salvi chi può!
programme.desc: I Chipmunks e le Chipettes trasformano una lussuosa nave da crociera in una personale area giochi, fino al momento in cui non vengono catapultati fuori bordo e approdano su un’isola deserta.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: La Mia Prima Barbie: Felice Giorno da Sogno
programme.desc: Canta insieme a Barbie, Barbie, Teresa e Renee in questa avventura musicale mentre pianificano la più grande festa di compleanno a sorpresa di sempre per la sorella di Barbie, Chelsea. "Più grande di UN SEMPLICE compleanno, dobbiamo pianificare un GIORNO DA SOGNO!"

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il re Argon è grande, prepotente e cattivo, ma il suo mago Mordain è ancora peggio. Vuol usare i Puffi per rubare tutto l'oro del re!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffetta ha una nuova amica, Laura, una bimba di sei anni i cui genitori vivono sul limitare del bosco. | Golosone ha esagerato! E diventato così grosso che il suo peso gli è di impaccio e Gargamella sta per catturarlo! Riuscirà il Grande Puffo a salvare il Puffo grassottello?

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Una missione nella palude non è certo un compito adatto al Puffo Pauroso. Chi sfiderà dunque il mostro della palude se non il Puffo che non poteva dire di no?

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Nessuno batte il Puffo Inventore! Ha creato una macchina ingegnosa che coltiva le verdure e cuoce tutto automaticamente. Si puffi chi può! | L'inverno è arrivato all'improvviso e tutti i Puffi si sono ammalati!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Quattrocchi ha deciso di dedicarsi alla medicina ed alla salute dei Puffi… Con un piccolo aiuto del terribile Gargamella!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Questa è la tenera storia dell'amicizia tra Puffetta ed un piccolo topolino. Un triste evento porta Puffetta alle lacrime… Riusciranno i Puffi a ridonarle il sorriso? | Il Puffo Sognatore desidera tanto incontrare gle extraterrestri, ma nessuno gli dà retta.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Simon si è perso nella foresta ed è alla ricerca dei suoi genitori. Simon è figlio di una coppia di giganti. I Puffi cercano di riportarlo a casa, ma Gargamella interrompe la festa.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il furto dell'oro delle Fate da parte di Gargamella porta quasi a uno stato di guerra tra le Fate e i Puffi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Lo spettacolo teatrale dei Puffi "Robin Puffo" prende vita: il leggendario eroe è interpretato da un attore davvero bravo...

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: Air Bud 3
programme.desc: Quando Emma, la nuova ragazzina carina,si unisce alla squadra di calcio maschile, Josh e Buddy decidono che quest’anno si gioca a calcio. Come Josh ed Emma iniziano a conoscersi, Buddy e Molly, il cane di Emma, iniziano a incontrarsi fugacemente di notte.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Dubitando Di Thomas - Bugie E Spie
programme.desc: Thomas è un ragazzo conosciuto per la sua capacità di raccontare sempre frottole. Quando s’imbatte per sbaglio in un piano per rapire la figlia del Presidente, prova ad allertare le autorità.

programme.title: Il ragazzo e il grande elefante
programme.desc: Da quando entrambi i genitori sono morti, Phoenix viene affidato alla zia Sarah, che vive in Africa con suo marito Jack. Qui rimane subito affascinato dalla natura selvaggia del continente. Durante un safari incontrerà un grande elefante con cui andrà incontro a emozionanti avventure.

programme.desc: T'Pau's Carol Decker with 30 years of the most amazing women who ROCK! From Grace Slick in the 60s to Florence Welch in the 00s - these ladies all left an incredible mark.

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: Alex Baker's Biggest 00s Anthems!
programme.desc: Alex Baker brings you his 50 biggest 00s anthems! Expect everything from Green Day to Muse, Linkin Park to the Arctic Monkeys with the tunes getting bigger and louder as we go!

programme.title: Big Name Nicknames! Top 25
programme.desc: The decade had The King of Pop & The Purple One, but we also had The Groover From Vancouver & The Madonna Of The East! What nickname did your favourite popstar have in the 80s?

programme.title: First Blast of Summer!
programme.desc: The Heat Is On with the hottest tunes of the 80s! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the decade had to offer.

programme.title: Limahl's Never Ending Soundtracks!
programme.desc: 2 decades of movie moments and classic pop hits from the 70s & 80s. Direct from the red carpet - Limahl is ready for his close-up!

programme.title: Bros vs New Kids!
programme.desc: It's time to drop some boys, with the ulimate battle of late 80s boybands - were you a Brosette, or were you Hangin' Tough?

programme.title: Matt Goss' Famous Pop of the 80s!
programme.desc: Matt has hand-picked 25 tracks by amazing performers - all of them famous pop songs of the 80s. From Madness in 1980 to Madonna in 1989.

programme.title: We're Feelin' 80s All Over!
programme.desc: All 80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!

programme.title: School Disco of Rock! Top 25
programme.desc: Back to the 80s & back to the school disco for some proper full-on guitar action! Including ZZ Top, Iron Maiden, Alice Cooper & a double dose of Springsteen.

programme.title: Turbo Trax!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Carol Decker's Power No.1s!
programme.desc: Many of the big power hits that we know & love today were released during the 80s, and the best reached No.1 either here or in the USA. Carol blasts through the decade - in order!

programme.title: Rock Number 1s! 1980-1989
programme.desc: An hour of rockin' chart toppers from the 80s.

programme.title: Turbo Trax!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Pop Gold! 80s v 90s
programme.desc: Bruno Brookes with a quickfire party countdown crossing 2 decades - one from the 80s followed by another from the 90s! Expect Donna Summer, Steps, Sinitta & S-Club 7.

programme.title: First Blast of Summer!
programme.desc: The Heat Is On with the hottest tunes of the 80s! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the decade had to offer.

programme.title: The Heat Is On! Top 30
programme.desc: 30 videos about fire, heat & the hot summer sun - whether your Beds Are Burning, you're All Fired Up, Hot In The City or maybe Walking In The Sunshine!

programme.title: First Blast of Summer!
programme.desc: The Heat Is On with the hottest tunes of the 80s! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the decade had to offer.

programme.title: Every Song From NOW 9 - 1987
programme.desc: NOW 9 was released in 1987 and featured all the tracks of the moment. A double vinyl or double tape, the choice was yours - but the double CD had to wait until NOW 10!

programme.title: Only the Biggest 80s Anthems!
programme.desc: All killer - no filler! The anthems that made a decade - from Madonna to Prince, Michael to George, Duran Duran to Pet Shop Boys.

programme.title: Andy Crane Broom Cupboard Bangers!
programme.desc: Strap yourself in as Andy takes you back to late 80s teatime on BBC1 - Blue Peter, Grange Hill & Neighbours - plus 30 of the very best feel-good chart bangers from that era!

programme.title: Spring Has Sprung!
programme.desc: The feelgood pop decade just got even better with the end of winter and the advent of Spring! Bring it on - 80s style!

programme.title: Timmy Mallett's Brilliant Bands!
programme.desc: Timmy's back with something a little different - a run through of his favourite 80s bands, many interviewed on his "Timmy On The Tranny" radio show throughout the decade!

programme.title: Spring Has Sprung!
programme.desc: The feelgood pop decade just got even better with the end of winter and the advent of Spring! Bring it on - 80s style!

programme.title: 1987's Lesser-Heard-Hits!

programme.title: Way Back When! 1987
programme.desc: 60 minutes of lesser heard hits from 1987. Including Nick Kamen, Kenny G, Climie Fisher, The Jets & Boogie Box High.

programme.title: The Best 1980 Party - Ever!
programme.desc: 2 hours of the biggest party tunes from 40 years ago! Including Geno, Stomp, Atomic & Baggy Trousers!

programme.title: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!

programme.title: Sinitta's High Energy Hits! Top 25

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: The saga continues as the Bay Area sound conquers the world. Witness the evolution from underground heroes to global icons through exclusive interviews and rare footage. Experience the peak of the thrash metal revolution

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: An essential piece of rock history. Since 1969, Wishbone Ash has taken their legendary twin-guitar sound across the globe. Witness this milestone 30th-anniversary performance captured live in London.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Beker on tour S36
programme.desc: Costine marinate - I nuovi episodi di Beker on tour grill edition partono dalle splendide colline del Friuli Venezia Giulia. Si torna alla genesi del mondo del BBQ, ovvero a sua maesta' il fuoco

programme.title: Parola di chef
programme.desc: Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Dolcemente
programme.desc: S12 - Il volto dolce del Gambero Rosso, Maurizio Santin, ci insegna a realizzare dolci originali e creativi per deliziare il palato di tutti.

programme.title: Le grandi famiglie del vino
programme.desc: Franciacorta un vino una terra - La storia del Franciacorta, dalle prime produzioni amatoriali, al salto di qualità avvenuto con Ziliani che ha fatto di questo vino un prodotto dell’eccellenza vinicola italiana conosciuto in tutto il mondo

programme.title: Max alla brace
programme.desc: S.1 - Max Mariola in cortile alle prese con un bbq. Ricette gustose e originali da realizzare nel giardino di casa o per passare qualche ora all’aperto

programme.title: Petra
programme.desc: Una farina per ogni ricetta. Molte sono le farine esistenti e ognuna ha il proprio specifico uso in cucina. Scopriamolo con Petra e l'Unversità della farina

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina
programme.desc: Pesaro, Urbino - Giorgione viaggia nelle Marche per fare incetta dei prodotti di questa terra. Curiosità, consigli e le immancabile ricette.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S10
programme.desc: Gramigna verza e pancetta e spaghetti uovo e mortadella - Per il suo compleanno papà Roberto ha ricevuto in regalo un set di pentole. Quale altra occasione per inaugurarle se non due ricette facili e veloci?

programme.title: Storie di cucina marchigiana
programme.desc: Un viaggio per immergersi nei sapori, nei profumi, nei prodotti della tradizione marchigiana accompagnati da Daniele Citeroni, chef marchigiano profondamente legato alle sue radici

programme.title: Storie di cucina marchigiana
programme.desc: Un viaggio per immergersi nei sapori, nei profumi, nei prodotti della tradizione marchigiana accompagnati da Daniele Citeroni, chef marchigiano profondamente legato alle sue radici

programme.title: Pensieri in barattolo
programme.desc: Sugo alla nerano - La cultura del riciclo è una costante di Peppe e tutto ciò che non può essere riutilizzato al momento, può essere conservato in barattolo. Il ragù ad esempio dopo una cottura di 5/6 ore è pronto per essere conservato e riutilizzato al bisogno

programme.title: Sardegna experience
programme.desc: Il viaggio di Luigi Pomata nella sua Sardegna, dall'entroterra al mare un caleidoscopio di sapori e saperi. Luoghi, persone e tradizioni che rendono unica questa isola

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about the grill as Thai chef and cookbook author Pailin Changchitnant makes dish after dish to go on the BBQ, like grilled eggplant salad, steak with dipping sauce or in a salad, and fish in banana leaves.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Every culture has its version of finger food and in Japan it’s called Izakaya! Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen prepares tapas dishes perfect for nighttime snacking.

programme.desc: Join Chef Craig Wong as he teaches us his tricks for building beautiful bowls full of broth and flavour in his celebration of soup.

programme.title: One World Kitchen

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Salad is a wonderful addition to any meal, and sometimes even a meal on its own"... today, the talented Chef Craig Wong shares several of his superior salad ideas.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates is television's best travel show that never leaves the kitchen. Skilled Chef Craig Wong is your host, and prepare to be blown away by his takes on the foods of France and Vietnam. First up? A re-write of a popular Vietnamese street snack made with Clams and Sesame Rice Noodles. Next? Marrow Toast dresses up in its tux and tails for a version made with King Oyster Mushrooms and Sauce Bordelaise. The common ingredient is Baguette; check out supersonic versions of French Jambon Beurre and Vietnamese Banh Mi. The Big Dish blends delicate sole with ProvencÌ§ale flavour spiked Nuoc Cham and a crunchy Haricot Amandine inspired Vietnamese crepe.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Warm and talented Cantonese home cook Mary Tang kick starts this One World Kitchen 3 episode by show- casing traditional, evERS-popular dim-sum dishes. First up, juicy Pork-Filled Dumplings! Made with fresh watERS-chest- nuts, shiitake mushrooms and a blend of Asian sauces and spices, these sweet and salty bite-sized creations are to die for! To add to our desire, Mary fries up some savoury Chinese Daikon Radish Cakes in a piping hot wok. Next, a flavourful lotus leaf filled with sticky rice and a medley of salted duck eggs, Shaoxing wine, and dried shrimp is truly hard to resist! To finish off, Mary combines gorgeous Adzuki beans with rice flour and sesame seeds to create airy and full...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Say goodbye to dirty cutlery in this One World Kitchen 3 episode featuring Vietnamese finger foods! Talented cook Lisa Nguyen starts off by making delicious Pork Skewer Rolls - perfect for any party! Featuring tender pork, crispy lettuce, fresh mint, crunchy cucumber, and Chinese chives wrapped in soft rice paper, this dish pairs well with a nuoc cham dipping sauce. Sticky Lemongrass Spare Ribs are next up to the plate; steamed and marinated in a garlicy, caramel glaze (yum!). Next, Lisa fries up some tasty Shrimp and Sweet Potato Fritters using a foolproof technique, adding nuoc cham dipping sauce and lovely Bibb lettuce on the side. Finally, fingERS-licking Vietnamese Coffee Cupcakes...

programme.title: La linea de la memoria
programme.desc: Rafael works in the port of Cádiz. He is a ship captain who spent many years sailing. His father was a historian and together they wrote a great book on the history of the port of Cádiz. Miguel is Rafael's friend since childhood. He is a big fan of sailing and travel around the world twice. The two protagonists are determined that the city of Cádiz recovers its glorious historical memory. Especially, the part concerning one of the most interesting episodes related to the Sea: the history of the Meridian of Cádiz (“zero Meridian”), valid for one hundred years in the eighteenth century for all the navigators of the world. Throughout the documentary, we know Rafael and Miguel and also their activities aimed at enhancing the history of the city. Finally, a group of students, in a very eye-catching action, “draw” with a red cloth the ancient meridian on the streets, squares and roofs of the city.

programme.desc: Journey on a captivating trek across Gozo, Malta, exploring its rich history, from Ulysses’ legendary journey to resistance against Ottoman invasions. The adventure continues to Turkey, where we trace ancient civilisations like the Hittites, Romans, and Greeks, following the path of Alexander the Great.

Discover how Mediterranean rhythms echo across genres, generations, and cultures.

programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 24
programme.desc: Gold Cuisine EP 24

programme.title: Med Nations 12 Lebanon
programme.desc: Lebanon, where the Mediterranean coast meets mountains steeped in history. From the vibrant streets of Beirut to ancient ruins and seaside villages, Lebanon reveals a rich mix of culture, cuisine, and traditions that showcase its unique Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.title: Med Minds 09 Hypatia
programme.desc: Hypatia, the brilliant philosopher of the Mediterranean, became a timeless symbol of knowledge, reason, and courage.

programme.title: Vivi e lascia vivere
programme.desc: As Giovanni’s life hangs in the balance, Laura’s world spirals further into chaos. Toni risks everything to see him, while Laura faces a dangerous blackmail threat. Meanwhile, her business and future are at stake as powerful forces push for its closure. With everything on the line, an unexpected twist forces Laura to make her final, life-changing decision.

programme.title: Mentre ero via
programme.desc: Monica returns home, trying to reconnect with her children while facing tension from her in-laws. As therapy begins to unlock memories, she starts sensing that those around her may be hiding the truth.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: Film and Cinema Festivals
programme.desc: Film and Cinema Festivals

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Med Minds 09 Hypatia

programme.title: Malini Angelica Lisbon
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Lisbon, the vibrant capital of Portugal. Once founded by the Phoenicians and shaped by Romans, Moors, and explorers of the Golden Age, Lisbon’s layered history is reflected in its culture and charm. During her visit, the city comes alive with the Festas Populares de Lisboa — a June celebration of Saint Anthony filled with music, dancing, and barbecued sardines. Malini samples local favorites like grilled sardines, bifanas, and the famous pastel de nata, and experiences the soulful beauty of Fado music. Lisbon’s warmth, flavor, and festive spirit show why it remains one of Europe’s most beloved cities.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 24
programme.desc: Gold Cuisine EP 24

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.desc: Seep visits Luxor, where she is impressed by the magnificent monuments that have survived from Thebes, the capital of ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Driek travels to Coimbra. Where he visits the Santa Cruz Church, a park and Santa Claire monastery. Concluding with a visit to Coimbra University.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey, Milagros goes to Trujillo, where she introduces the flavors of the northern region of Peru and also Marinera – the sensuous national dance. But the highlight in Trujillo are the forgotten sites like Chan Chan and Huaca del Moche, where secrets from Peru’s pre-Incan past begin to unfold.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Amman, the capital of Jordan sits on a wealth of seven hills, a monotonous sea of white cement structures with the occasional minarets and buildings.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: Salzburg, boasts a culinary scene as sensational as Mozart, the composer who was born here. Chef Joe Remblance enjoys some of its celebrated dishes.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alexandra explores Kargil, where she is invited for breakfast by the owner of a resort where she is putting up and understands the influence of the cultures on the locals.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.desc: Alexandria in Egypt is a city that has reinvented itself over the centuries but has not forgotten its roots.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Driek today travels to Porto, surrounded by chapela, monasteries and churches. He visits a Wine cellar and learns about wine production of Portugal.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.desc: Rafe visits Chefchaouen and is instantly besotted with the city, much to the confusion of the locals who are baffled by his eccentricities.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Atlantis is designed to inspire awe, and the moment you step in, you find everything about it to be larger than life. It's here that your surreal dreams harmoniously blend into the unmatched luxury.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.desc: The dining scene in Manchester has changed considerably over the last 20 years. Stuffy fine dining places have been replaced with street food and flavours from across the globe. Joe Remblance explores this cosmopolitan approach that has seeped into Manchester’s culinary scene though European dishes such as Black Pudding and Tzaziki, Asian dishes such as Chicken Curry and innovative dishes such as a fried chicken waffle pizza and deep-fried Cadbury Crème Eggs.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alex explores Munshi Aziz Bhat Museum displaying the lives of the people, influenced by the traders and travels further on the way to Srinagar. She admires the beauty of Mt. Kun and Nun Kun glacier.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Rishikesh, the heartland of yoga, is widely known for mystical stories, spiritual awakenings, rejuvenation and peace. Travel enthusiast, Larissa D’Sa comes to Rishikesh looking for a relaxing getaway, and loses herself in its natural beauty. From relishing earthy Garhwali flavours to witnessing the larger-than-life Ganga aarti, her experiences in the land, where great sages and famous musicians came to find peace, help her to unwind.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Our host travels to Douro Valley and is seen exploring vineyards and learning about the history behind it. Concluding his journey at Troia and Évora.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.desc: The imperial city of Fes, with its richly evocative attractions, makes Rafe feel like he is in a movie...with a plot twist right around the corner.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Rising graciously from the Arabian Gulf towards the azure sky, Atlantis, the Palm stands on the crescent of the iconic Palm Jumeirah. The exotic resort captures the world’s imagination with its mystical aura.

programme.title: Food Stories
programme.desc: Find out how the flavours of China have come to be such an integral part of the cuisine of Singapore.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: On reaching Zanskar, Alex visits Karsha Monastery, the largest one in Zanskar. She ends her stay after exploring the Sani Kanika Monastery, built in 17th century and the stupa.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: From the fragrances at the Perfume Souk to a hot air balloon ride in the desert, Sabrina gets a taste of heritage and luxury at Madinat Jumeirah.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Frankfurt is the financial capital of the European Union. Kristina discovers that the city has much more to offer than just a good business meeting, as she learns about its history and architecture through its famous sights such as the Kaizerdom Cathedral and the Eltz Castle. She also goes to Rudesheim, where she encounters an amazing collection of data operated music instruments.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.desc: At Casablanca, Rafe draws hilarious connections between what he sees, and the 1942 Hollywood classic named after the city.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: Elisha gets some old-world style pampering at Die Swaene, a luxury boutique hotel situated in the heart of the historic center of Bruges.

programme.title: Food STories Singapore
programme.desc: People of Indian ancestry comprise Singapore’s third-largest ethnic group, in fact, Singapore traces its origins to two Sanskrit words – ‘Singha’ or lion and ‘Pura’ or city. And yet, from fish head curry to Indian ‘Rojak’, Indian food in Singapore is something that confuses visitors from India. How did the “Indian” dishes of the Lion City come to be so distinct?

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.desc: Alex is in Srinagar putting up on a houseboat. She explores the Dal lake, tries Kashmiri Tea, and ends her day with a traditional Kashmiri platter – Wazwan.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Often called Germany's most livable city, Munich is also one of its most historic, artistic, and entertaining cities. Until 1871, it was the capital of an independent Bavaria. Kristina Guberman admires the elegance of the city through its attractions such as the Gothic city palace, Residenz, the popular Marienplatz square and the stylish BMW Museum.

programme.title: Bliss

programme.title: Food Stories
programme.desc: What does the cuisine of Singapore, which has almost entirely been shaped by immigrants, tell us about the culture of the land?

But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.
